title: Sump Pump Installation Cost Calculator
metaTitle: Sump Pump Installation Cost Calculator | 2025-2026 Estimates
metaDescription: Estimate sump pump installation costs by pump type, horsepower, basin, discharge line, and region. Compare submersible, pedestal, battery backup, and combination system prices.

inputs.label: Pump Type

options.label: Battery Backup Only ($300–$800 — power outage protection)

inputs.helpText: Submersible pumps sit inside the pit and are quieter. Pedestal pumps sit above the pit and are easier to service. Battery backup systems run when the primary pump fails or power goes out.

inputs.label: Horsepower

options.label: 1/2 HP (+15% — high water table or large basement)

inputs.helpText: 1/3 HP handles most residential basements. Upgrade to 1/2 HP or higher for homes with a high water table, frequent flooding, or basements larger than 1,500 sq ft.

inputs.label: Sump Basin / Pit

options.label: Existing Basin — no new pit needed (+$0)

inputs.helpText: If replacing an existing sump pump, you likely already have a basin. New construction or first-time installations require excavating and installing a new basin.

inputs.label: Discharge Line
inputs.helpText: The discharge line routes water away from the foundation. Exterior lines with burial prevent ice blockage and discharge water further from the house.

inputs.label: Check Valve

options.label: None (+$0 — use if existing valve is functional)
Quiet Check Valve (+$60–$120 — reduced water hammer)

inputs.helpText: A check valve prevents water from flowing back into the pit when the pump shuts off. Required for all new installations. Quiet check valves reduce the 'clunking' sound when the pump cycles off.

inputs.label: Region
inputs.helpText: Adjusts base installation labor ($300–$600) for regional plumber and handyman labor rate differences.

formulaCitation: HomeAdvisor / Angi 2025-2026 national averages; Sump Pump Advisor installation cost data
formulaSource: Sump pump unit costs from HomeAdvisor and Angi 2025-2026 national average surveys and major manufacturer MSRP data (Zoeller, Wayne, Liberty Pumps). Horsepower multipliers derived from pump manufacturer pricing data. Basin installation costs from HomeAdvisor foundation and drainage cost data. Discharge line costs from plumbing contractor survey data. Check valve costs from major plumbing supply retailers. Base labor range of $300–$600 from HomeAdvisor sump pump installation surveys. Regional labor multipliers from BLS Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (SOC 47-2152 plumbers and pipefitters).
